recommendations.title: The Blue Caftan
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tailor and his wife find their relationship challenged by the arrival of a handsome new apprentice.

recommendations.title: Sunday Bloody Sunday

recommendations.title: Heartless
recommendations.overview: Jamie Morgan is a troubled young man with a facial birthmark, which has left him isolated and fearful, hiding from the world outside. He lives in the East End, notorious for its violent hooded gangs. According to news reports, the gangs are now weari

recommendations.title: The Neighbor
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man in a stagnant marriage, finds his life upended when an attractive young woman and her seemingly abusive husband move in next door.

recommendations.title: Everything Is Illuminated
recommendations.overview: A young Jewish American man endeavors—with the help of eccentric, distant relatives—to find the woman who saved his grandfather during World War II—in a Ukrainian village which was ultimately razed by the Nazis.

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: The Paper Tigers
recommendations.overview: Three middle aged men polish their martial arts skills to avenge their fallen master.

recommendations.title: Foxcatcher
recommendations.overview: The greatest Olympic Wrestling Champion brother team joins Team Foxcatcher led by multimillionaire sponsor John E. du Pont as they train for the 1988 games in Seoul - a union that leads to unlikely circumstances.

recommendations.title: The Neighbors' Window
recommendations.overview: The story of a middle-aged woman with small children whose life is shaken up when two free-spirited twenty-somethings move in across the street.

recommendations.title: Cirque du Soleil: Worlds Away
